chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-1266 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ PRIORITY. 1) For orders on office objection No. 01. 2) For hearing of Misc. No. 6466/2025. 3) For hearing of main case. 05.08.2025. Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Khan, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Aftab Ahmed, Advocate for Respondent. ________________ Petitioner’s Counsel has filed a statement for disposal of this Petition on the ground that purpose of filing of this Petition has been served. Statement is taken on record. Petition is dismissed as infructuous along with pending application(s). CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/
